heading: Today
text: Partly to mostly sunny. Highs in the low to mid 60s. Winds becoming north to northwest 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Mainly clear. Lows from the upper 20s to mid 30s, some upper 30s in the broad valleys west. Winds becoming light and variable.

heading: Monday
text: Mostly sunny, then becoming partly cloudy northeast, and over high terrain. Highs in the mid to upper 60s. Light winds, variable to south.
